warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round
Warm Up
10 Scap Push Ups
10 scap Pull ups
5 Hindu Push Ups
10m bear Crawls
10 x Inch Worms
10 Cossack Squats

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
AMRAP x 8 mins
6 Dips
30 Double Unders
10 American KB Swing
Scale Dips to Parallette push ups
Scale Doubles to 60 Singles

gymnastics:
EMOM x 4
12 Hollow Rocks
EMOM x 5 mins (04:00)
5 Box Pistols (slow and controlled)
EMOM x 5 (09:00)
5 Eccentric Lower
Two Leg stand Up
EMOM x 5 (14:00-19:00)
Counterbalance Pistols - Small Plate
Warm Up
10 Scap Push Ups
10 scap Pull ups
5 Hindu Push Ups
10m bear Crawls
10 x Inch Worms
10 Cossack Squats
EMOM x 6 10 Hollow Rocks or 20 second Hollow Hold
Dip Progression
EMOM x 5 (06:00)
Ring Support Hold OR Box Support Hold
EMOM x 3 (11:00)
Scapular Dips - Keep arms Long
EMOM x 3 (14:00)
Bench Dip Isometrics
20-3-10-2 (hold-down-hold-up)
EMOM x 5 (17:00)
10 x Box Dips Feet in front and Long
EMOM x 5 (22:00)
strict or kipping ring dips
Double Under Progression
Even Min Singles - focus on jumping higher
Odd Mins Penguin Clap Drill
Double Under attempts -
Double - single - single - single - Double
for the DU Experts - go for max sets every 2-3 mins

hypertrophy.reasoning: Today heavily taxes pressing and grip; build antagonists and posterior chain without competing for recovery resources.

siri_text: Thursday's workout. Gymnastics: . Metcon: AMRAP 8 minutes: 6 Dips, 30 Double Unders, 10 American KB Swing, Scale Dips to Parallette push ups. For hypertrophy, focus on back, biceps, rear delts.
